title: Intensely Gooey Brazilian Cheese Casserole
description: A fermented cheese-pull Brazilian dish featuring praline-french and tadka influences, made with ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients, perfect for meal prep
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
Cube the praline french bread and toast until lightly browned
Melt the ghee in a pan over medium heat and add the tadka spice blend
Add the chopped cilantro, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir well
Combine the toasted bread, melted ghee mixture, and queijo coalho in a large bowl
Mix well until the bread is evenly coated with the cheese and spice mixture
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and drizzle with ayurvedic tamasic-friendly oil
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned
